title: Install side vehicle windows
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Install side vehicle windows demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to install side window

pcs.text: Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Information is accessed and interpreted from manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and sealant safety data sheets (SDS)1.3 Work is planned to minimise waste and use time efficiently1.4 Vehicle is inspected to ensure there is no prior damage and that all related accessories are operating correctly1.5 Materials required to install side window are selected and checked for quality1.6 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.7 Tools and equipment for making opening and installing side window are selected and checked for serviceability1.8 Vehicle is protected and safely located according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Information is accessed and interpreted from manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and sealant safety data sheets (SDS)1.3 Work is planned to minimise waste and use time efficiently1.4 Vehicle is inspected to ensure there is no prior damage and that all related accessories are operating correctly1.5 Materials required to install side window are selected and checked for quality1.6 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.7 Tools and equipment for making opening and installing side window are selected and checked for serviceability1.8 Vehicle is protected and safely located according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Information is accessed and interpreted from manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and sealant safety data sheets (SDS)1.3 Work is planned to minimise waste and use time efficiently1.4 Vehicle is inspected to ensure there is no prior damage and that all related accessories are operating correctly1.5 Materials required to install side window are selected and checked for quality1.6 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.7 Tools and equipment for making opening and installing side window are selected and checked for serviceability1.8 Vehicle is protected and safely located according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to install side window

elements.title: Fabricate templates

pcs.text: Accurate measurements of shape and size of side window are taken in order to prepare templates2.2 Suitable materials and equipment are used to fabricate templates2.3 Templates are completed according to workplace procedures and without causing damage to vehicle or components
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Accurate measurements of shape and size of side window are taken in order to prepare templates2.2 Suitable materials and equipment are used to fabricate templates2.3 Templates are completed according to workplace procedures and without causing damage to vehicle or components?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Accurate measurements of shape and size of side window are taken in order to prepare templates2.2 Suitable materials and equipment are used to fabricate templates2.3 Templates are completed according to workplace procedures and without causing damage to vehicle or components.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Fabricate templates

elements.title: Mark out and cut panel for side window

pcs.text: Template is used to mark out areas on vehicle to be cut3.2 Window opening is cut in panel using approved methods and equipment according to workplace procedures and safety and environmental requirements3.3 Panel edges and trim are prepared for installation of side window3.4 Panels and trim are reinforced as required to comply with vehicle manufacturer specifications and without causing damage to vehicle or components
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Template is used to mark out areas on vehicle to be cut3.2 Window opening is cut in panel using approved methods and equipment according to workplace procedures and safety and environmental requirements3.3 Panel edges and trim are prepared for installation of side window3.4 Panels and trim are reinforced as required to comply with vehicle manufacturer specifications and without causing damage to vehicle or components?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Template is used to mark out areas on vehicle to be cut3.2 Window opening is cut in panel using approved methods and equipment according to workplace procedures and safety and environmental requirements3.3 Panel edges and trim are prepared for installation of side window3.4 Panels and trim are reinforced as required to comply with vehicle manufacturer specifications and without causing damage to vehicle or components.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Mark out and cut panel for side window

elements.title: Install side window

pcs.text: Material to be installed in vehicle side opening is selected and prepared 4.2 Side window is installed to manufacturer specifications using either rubber or direct glazing according to safety and environmental requirements4.3 Window in panel opening is secured using approved materials
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Material to be installed in vehicle side opening is selected and prepared 4.2 Side window is installed to manufacturer specifications using either rubber or direct glazing according to safety and environmental requirements4.3 Window in panel opening is secured using approved materials?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Material to be installed in vehicle side opening is selected and prepared 4.2 Side window is installed to manufacturer specifications using either rubber or direct glazing according to safety and environmental requirements4.3 Window in panel opening is secured using approved materials.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Install side window

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Final inspection is made to ensure work meets workplace expectations, related accessories are operating correctly, customer is informed of time to wait before driving vehicle, and vehicle is presented ready for use5.2 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable material is collected and stored5.3 Tools and equipment are checked, reported if faulty, and stored according to workplace procedures5.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Final inspection is made to ensure work meets workplace expectations, related accessories are operating correctly, customer is informed of time to wait before driving vehicle, and vehicle is presented ready for use5.2 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable material is collected and stored5.3 Tools and equipment are checked, reported if faulty, and stored according to workplace procedures5.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Final inspection is made to ensure work meets workplace expectations, related accessories are operating correctly, customer is informed of time to wait before driving vehicle, and vehicle is presented ready for use5.2 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable material is collected and stored5.3 Tools and equipment are checked, reported if faulty, and stored according to workplace procedures5.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Complete work processes
